claim: Product discernment involves asking if AI output is factually accurate, appropriate for the audience, coherent, well-structured, meets requirements, and adds value
actionable: Create a checklist of product quality criteria before accepting AI outputs in your workflow to ensure consistency
source_title: Lesson 8: A closer look at Discernment | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: Process discernment detects when AI has lapses in attention, takes inappropriate steps, gets stuck on one interpretation, or engages in circular reasoning during task execution
actionable: Review AI's reasoning steps periodically during long tasks to catch and redirect circular logic before substantial work is wasted
source_title: Lesson 8: A closer look at Discernment | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: Performance discernment evaluates whether AI communicates effectively, provides information helpfully, responds well to feedback, and makes interactions efficient
actionable: After each AI interaction, assess if the communication style and information format matched your needs and adjust instructions accordingly
source_title: Lesson 8: A closer look at Discernment | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: When discernment flags problems in AI outputs, effective feedback specifies the problem, explains why it's a problem, provides concrete suggestions, and may require rethinking the delegation approach entirely
actionable: Structure feedback loops with AI by first trying to improve description, then reconsidering if you're using the right tool or approach
source_title: Lesson 8: A closer look at Discernment | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course
